evidence.description: REQ-DLN-001..012 happy and error paths emit canonical events DeleteNoteRequested / NoteFileDeleted / NoteDeletionFailed (Public) and TagInventoryUpdated (Internal). Outer-curry signature (deps, feed, inventory, editingCurrentNoteId) matches behavioral-spec.md Delta 4.

Revision 2 + sprint-2 convention note. All 6 contract deltas (TrashFile, DeleteNoteDeps, BuildDeleteNoteRequested, outer curry, AuthorizationError cause, AuthorizedDeletion filePath) realized in promptnotes/src/lib/domain/delete-note/_deltas.ts per documented convention.

REQ-DLN-005 fs.not-found graceful continue, REQ-DLN-013 disk-full normalization to 'unknown', snapshot-missing path, AuthorizationError optional cause propagation, FsError.unknown.detail propagation to NoteDeletionFailed.detail all covered by named tests
144/144 delete-note tests pass; 213/213 regression baseline (tag-chip-update + capture-auto-save) pass; tsc --noEmit clean for delete-note files
PROP-DLN-015: keyof DeleteNoteDeps does not include any editor-buffer key (no getEditorBuffer, no editingState). Structural non-coupling enforced at type level.
PROP-DLN-014: DeleteNoteRequested/NoteFileDeleted/NoteDeletionFailed are PublicDomainEvent; TagInventoryUpdated/NoteDeletion*Internal are CurateInternalEvent — verified at type level
All 18 proof obligations (PROP-DLN-001..018) PASS at sprint-2; 9 marked required; verifier audit confirms purity invariants hold after sprint-2 changes
Sprint-2 mitigates FIND-IMPL-DLN-001 (TOCTOU on filePath) by threading filePath through AuthorizedDeletion; status changed from ACCEPTED to MITIGATED
7/7 functions audited; pure cores remain pure after sprint-2 changes (authorizeDeletionPure now returns extended AuthorizedDeletion with filePath but stays structurally pure)
